allow: Bash(printf 'Hornik1989UAT\\tArticle\\ttrue\\tHornik, Kurt and Stinchcombe, Maxwell and White, Halbert\\t1989\\tMultilayer Feedforward Networks Are Universal Approximators\\tNeural Networks\\t\\t2\\t5\\t359--366\\t10.1016/0893-6080\(89\)90020-8\\t\\t\\t\\t\\thttps://doi.org/10.1016/0893-6080\(89\)90020-8\\tdownloaded\\t\\t\\tthesis.tex\\t\\tThe model is treated as a surrogate function approximator \\\\cite{Hornik1989UAT}\\t\\tSupports the use of MLPs as universal function approximators, providing the theoretical basis for the surrogate regression approach.\\t支持将多层前馈网络作为通用函数逼近器的理论依据，为代理模型回归方法提供理论基础。\\tDOI verified.\\n')
